---
title: "Robert Stephenson Smyth Baden-Powell, 1st Lord Baden-Powel"
---

## Robert Stephenson Smyth Baden-Powell, 1st Lord Baden-Powel

**Dates:** (1857-1941)

### Description

founder of the Scout Movement

### Letters

- Letter from November 4, 1899.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
